title: Fast-Track Spending
query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(Cost), 0) AS total, COUNT(*) AS transactions FROM PowerplayFastTrack WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate

details.text: {total} Cr spent fast-tracking {transactions} powerplay delivery(ies) during the report period. Fast-tracking skips the delivery trip entirely in exchange for a significant credit cost — a large total here means you were willing to spend big to hit a deadline and drive your Power's agenda hard.
details.help: PowerplayFastTrack fires when a merit delivery is completed instantly for credits rather than physically transporting cargo. total drives the title as the expenditure headline.

tagLines: Fast-track transaction log compiled. Credits paid in lieu of courier runs noted in the Powerplay record.
Credits instead of inconvenience. It's expensive. You decided the deadline was worth it.
Fast-tracking is the busy commander's political compromise. The Power got its merits. You kept your schedule.
